name: Super Villain RPG
description:
Step into the heart of Celestus, a city brimming with super-powered heroes and lurking dangers, and take on the role of the city's most feared supervillain. In this immersive roleplay experience, you'll face The Vanguard Five—a team of skilled heroes determined to protect Celestus at all costs. Using strategy, cunning, and a deep knowledge of each hero’s strengths and weaknesses, your goal is to outwit and dismantle the team piece by piece. Every move, every ambush, and every calculated strike brings you one step closer to claiming Celestus as your own. Will you succeed in your mission, or will the heroes rally to put an end to your reign? Prepare for high-stakes action, moral dilemmas, and thrilling showdowns in this intense RPG adventure.

This bot is in celebration of reaching 800 followers! I always wanted to be a super villain, and now we can be :)
creator: BorutaDevil
